programmes.show_description: We party into summertime with another MASSIVE 70s singalong session. We recommend you ignore the lost hour, and party all night!
Mark Goodier with 1971's big music award winners. Who was 'Best Newcomer' at the Grammys, and which comedian got the coveted UK Christmas Number 1?
What was in the Top 10 during the Easter holiday in the 70s? We choose 3 mega-hits from each year, 1970 to 1979, with ABBA, Blondie, 10cc, Slade, Kate Bush, Mud, Squeeze, and more!
Feelgood sunshine hits from a colourful decade - the 1970s! Flares and mini-skirts at the ready?
Songs you really like but are a bit too embarrassed to admit. Don't worry, we're all in the same boat here & Pat urges you to try to have a little less shame in your musical game!
From hippies to punk rockers, via folk, funk, soul & disco - these are the classic songs that made the 70s!
Exclusive to NOW 70s, Mark Goodier brings this marathon 100 countdown of the decade's biggest acts, based on global record sales, live concert takings, and awards. So who's No.1?
Non-stop 70s rock & guitar action - all night!
Turn it up loud for 2 hours of proper rock from the 70s - the decade that gave birth to Prog and Metal! Including Pink Floyd, Led Zeppelin, Black Sabbath, Alice Cooper, AC/DC and Queen.
Turn it up loud for 2 hours of proper rock from the 70s - the decade that gave birth to Prog and Metal! Including Pink Floyd, Led Zeppelin, Black Sabbath, Alice Cooper, AC/DC and Queen.
Over-bearded men & leftfield ladies - all with fabulous tunes! These are alternative hits from the west coast, the underground & the counter culture of the 1970s.
From the era of glam rock, new wave and disco, it's all the hits from just one decade - the 1970s! Platform boots and flares at the ready?
We didn't yet call them Power Ballads, but some masters of the genre - Boston, Toto & Whitesnake - were already at it! Simes has twenty-five power pop love songs and ballads - in order.
What was in the Top 10 during the Easter holiday in the 70s? We choose 3 mega-hits from each year, 1970 to 1979, with ABBA, Blondie, 10cc, Slade, Kate Bush, Mud, Squeeze, and more!
Feelgood hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Tony's pulled out quite a list of pop pinups for two hours of indulgence. Bolan, Bowie, Cassidy, an Osmond, Abba girls, Rod, and ladies' men Barry White and Demis Roussos. Phwoar!
Our most complete list yet of UK number 1s of the decade! Some songs just don't have videos, but 146 chart toppers do, and here they are - in order!
